hero.title: Loyalty program
hero.subtitle: More coffee, more benefits
hero.description: A simple loyalty program for regular Wake Cup guests who visit for specialty coffee, pastries, takeaway orders, and cafe moments.

steps.title: Join the program
steps.description: Ask the Wake Cup team to add you to the loyalty program or join through our contact channels.

steps.title: Visit or order
steps.description: Buy coffee, pastries, dessert boxes, or takeaway drinks as usual.

steps.title: Receive guest benefits
steps.description: Get rewards, personal offers, birthday bonuses, and special conditions when available.

items.name: Guest
items.description: The starting level for new guests who want simple Wake Cup offers and updates.

items.name: Regular guest
items.description: A level for returning guests who visit more often for coffee, pastries, and takeaway.
benefits: Coffee or pastry bonus when available

items.name: VIP guest
items.description: A special level for loyal guests, frequent visitors, and private coffee event clients.
benefits: Special attention for birthdays and family visits

specialDates.title: Birthday and special dates
specialDates.description: Guests can receive small gifts, discounts, or personal offers for birthdays, anniversaries, family celebrations, and other important dates.
items: Special conditions for small cafe gatherings

terms.title: Simple terms
items: Some rewards may require advance order
The team can explain current active offers before your visit

cta.title: Join the loyalty program
cta.description: Ask our team about current loyalty benefits, active offers, and the easiest way to join.
cta.label: Ask about loyalty
